The image displays a static interior shot of a building lobby or corridor, likely taken by a security camera. To the right side of the frame are two elevator doors made of grey metal; the door on the far right is labeled with "4F" in dark lettering. A black wall-mounted telephone is attached to the white wall next to the elevators. In the center foreground, a large, translucent plastic bag filled with bulky items sits on the floor. Directly behind this bag is a small red step stool and a darker rectangular object. To the left, there is a wooden railing with vertical metal bars that overlooks a lower level. Through the glass partition above the railing, another room or area is visible in the background, illuminated by blueish light, containing what appears to be industrial machinery or equipment and possibly some people working. The flooring is a neutral beige color.
### Visible Text
- "4F" on the elevator door.
- "160 SW 2/80 - 07/20/2019 19:32:39" at the bottom of the frame.
### Notable Changes
This is the first frame, so no comparisons are possible yet.

## Frame 1083 (3246.0s) [TAG:DOJ_CLEAN_V2]

- ### Detailed Description
    - A surveillance shot captures a hallway lobby area with an elevator on the right side labeled "46".
    - On the far left, a person is seated on a blue bench or sofa, partially visible in shadow.
    - In the center foreground, there is a large, transparent plastic bag containing various items resting on the floor.
    - Directly behind the plastic bag is a red object, which looks like a small bin or low stool.
    - The background features a doorway with vertical railings leading into a brightly lit office or reception area where desks and chairs are visible.
    - A black intercom or telephone handset is mounted on the wall to the right of the elevator door.
    - Two light fixtures are visible, one illuminating the hall and another brightening the room in the background.
    - The timestamp overlay at the bottom reads "160 SW 2,80 - 07/20/2019 19:54:39".
- ### Visible Text
    - [NONE] (Note: There is text on the elevator glass and timestamp, but per instructions to transcribe verbatim, usually this refers to overlay. The prompt says "write [NONE] if no text". I will assume this means main overlay or large signs. The prompt asks for "Visible Text (verbatim)". I see '46' and the date/time overlay.
